## Location of Documentation

Please provide links to the documentation page(s) or file paths that need improvement (e.g. `docs/architecture.md`, `README.md`).

## What needs to be improved?

Describe what is missing, outdated, or hard to understand.

## Proposed Changes

Provide a brief overview of what you plan to change or add. If you have specific text ready, feel free to share it here.

## Additional Context

Add any other context or references here.
